name: Ash
story: Ash has never missed a meal and never intends to. The sound of a food bowl being touched summons him from anywhere in the house.
Between meals he's a relaxed, unbothered roommate who gets along with everyone — cats, kids, and the vacuum cleaner.

medical.notes: Fully vetted. On measured meals — he'd prefer you didn't know that.

photoAlt: Ash, a sturdy grey tabby crouched next to his food bowl
